channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Tesla stock plummets but its sky-high valuation persists. Here’s why
item.description: Tesla’s stock has dropped by nearly half in three months. Even so, investors are still debating whether Elon Musk’s electric-vehicle maker remains overpriced.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Tesla's EV sales are plummeting – as used Model Y and Model 3 prices crash to bargain levels
item.description: Tesla's new car sales are dropping, but prices are also falling on the used car market as buyers look beyond Musk for electric vehicles.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: This entire nation's public health department was found to be running on a single Excel spreadsheet
item.description: Health New Zealand has been running around 6,000 apps and 100 networks, but its finances are tracked with Excel.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Dyson vacuums have one big problem and I don't understand why
item.description: Dyson needs to fix this basic usability issue across its full range, not just the most expensive model.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: AI slop is suffocating the web, says a new study
item.description: The generative AI revolution shows no sign of slowing as OpenAI recently rolled out its GPT-4.5 model to paying ChatGPT users, while competitors have announced plans to introduce their own latest models—including Anthropic, which unveiled Claude 3.7 Sonnet, its latest language model, late last month
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: OnePlus is ditching the Alert Slider for an iPhone-style customizable button - and I’ll be sad to see it go
item.description: OnePlus’ CEO has confirmed that the Alert Slider found on all OnePlus phones won’t be sticking around in future generations, replaced by an Apple-style customizable button
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: Top Bluetooth chip security flaw could put a billion devices at risk worldwide
item.description: ESPC32 Bluetooth chip, which has been sold in the billions, allegedly allowed remote access and backdoor deployment.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The OLED iPad Pro is reportedly less popular than expected –and that could mean these changes to Apple's OLED iPad plans
item.description: According to some well-placed sources, the switch to OLED hasn't shifted as many iPad Pros as Apple would've liked.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The US government still wants Google to sell off Chrome
item.description: The US DOJ has slackened AI and Android complaints, but still asserts Google should consider selling off its Chrome browser.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Mecalux integra la IA generativa en su ‘software’ de gestión de almacenes
item.description: Mecalux Sostware Solutions da un paso adelante en su estrategia de transformación digital al integrar la inteligencia artificial (IA) generativa en su software de gestión de almacenes Easy WMS con el propósito de responder a peticiones empleando el lenguaje natural.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Is the moon too far for your data? IBM's Red Hat is teaming up with Axiom Space to send a data center into space
item.description: IBM’s Red Hat has teamed up with Axiom Space to send a data center to the International Space Station this spring.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: 16 hijacked browser extensions expose 3.2 million users
item.description: Kurt the CyberGuy recommends deleting 16 browser extensions immediately in response to a report saying more than 3.2 million web users were affected by a security breach.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Helping DOGE cut waste
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: February’s IT job market in the US shows mixed signals; unemployment ticks up
item.description: “Sluggish” might be the best word to describe the IT job market after the US Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) published its data for February employment today. The data offered mixed signals for US tech jobs: even though the number of tech roles grew, unemployment rose.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: JFrog unveils JFrog ML for MLOps
item.description: JFrog has released JFrog ML, an MLOps solution designed to bring devops best practices to building, deploying, managing, and monitoring AI/ML workflows.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Musk's SpaceX confirms Starlink lease agreement with FAA
item.description: SpaceX confirmed Wednesday that it is leasing Starlink kits and service to the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) for free but denied any push to take over Verizon’s contract to build an updated communications system for the agency.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Out of the lab and into the streets, researchers and doctors rally for science against Trump cuts
item.description: Researchers, doctors, their patients and supporters are venturing out of labs, hospitals and offices across the country to stand up to what they call an attack on life-saving science by the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Seth Borenstein, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Empowering women in tech: Lessons from a DWP Digital leader
item.description: I’m Head of User Support Services within DWP Digital. In simple terms, if your IT isn’t working, my team is your first protocol to fix it. I have about 450 colleagues in my function, and we support over 90,000 colleagues. I’m also Head of our IT service management profession.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Drones are already transforming business
item.description: When you hear the word “drone,” what comes to mind? Most people think of fun consumer recreational copters that capture incredible video from the sky. Others think of military drones that spy on battlefields and drop bombs. It’s true that drones are transforming photography and war.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: JavaScript tools and frameworks we’re watching now
item.description: JavaScript is moving in two directions at once, favoring both comprehensive, full-stack frameworks and greater simplicity. Sometimes these trends are harmonious, and at other times they are at odds. The drive for frameworks and libraries that abstract away complexity is a key point of tension.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump signs executive order creating bitcoin reserve
item.description: President Trump signed an executive order Thursday to create a government reserve of bitcoin along with a "digital asset stockpile" in the administration's latest embrace of the cryptocurrency industry. According to the order, the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Alibaba says its new AI model rivals DeepSeeks’s R-1, OpenAI’s o1
item.description: Alibaba Cloud on Thursday launched QwQ-32B, a compact reasoning model built on its latest large language model (LLM), Qwen2.5-32b, one it says delivers performance comparable to other large cutting edge models, including Chinese rival DeepSeek and OpenAI’s o1, with only 32 billion parameters.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Albania shuts down TikTok for a year amid concerns over violence among children
item.description: TIRANA, Albania (AP) — The Albanian Cabinet decided on Thursday to shut down TikTok for 12 months, blaming the popular video-sharing platform for inciting violence and bullying, especially among children.
item.dc:creator: LLAZAR SEMINI, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Visual Studio Code 1.98 shines on GitHub Copilot
item.description: Visual Studio Code 1.98 has arrived, featuring enhancements to the GitHub Copilot AI coding assistant, including previews of Copilot Next Edit Suggestions, Copilot agent mode improvements, and Copilot Edits support for notebook files.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Siemens announces $285 million investment in US manufacturing
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Siemens plans to invest $285 million in manufacturing in the United States, the tech company said Thursday, including two new facilities in California and Texas. The U.S. is the largest market for the company. The recent investments in the Siemens' U.S.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: AI chatbots infected with Russian disinformation: Study
item.description: The world’s most popular artificial intelligence (AI) chatbots are infected with Russian disinformation, according to a study published Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: With new division, AWS bets big on agentic AI automation
item.description: Amazon Web Services customers can expect to hear a lot more about agentic AI in future with the news that the company is setting up a dedicated unit to promote the technology on its platform. The division will be headed by Swami Sivasubramanian, until now Amazon’s VP of AI and data services.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Data center vacancies hit historic lows despite record construction
item.description: Space supply in major data center markets increased by 34% year-over-year to 6,922.6 megawatts, considerable growth over the 26% increase in 2023 , according to CBRE research.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Tax scam alert: How to protect yourself and your tax refund
item.description: A cybersecurity firm has shed some light on just how common tax scams have become. Kurt the CyberGuy offers his advice for how to protect your refund.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Google experiments with AI-only search as competition heats up
item.description: Google has launched an experimental search mode that replaces traditional links with AI-generated summaries, as it ramps up efforts to integrate AI amid growing competition. Currently, Google Search displays AI Overviews, which provide summaries above traditional search results.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How to handle type erasure in advanced Java generics
item.description: Generics programming in Java enhances type safety and code reusability by allowing developers to define classes and methods using type parameters.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Review: Zencoder has a vision for AI coding
item.description: Zencoder is an AI coding assistant with interfaces to Visual Studio Code and JetBrains IDEs. It is designed to help developers ship products faster, much like GitHub Copilot, Amazon Q Developer, and Tabnine.
item.dc:creator: Info World
